common.appDescription: Tournament Management for Visually Impaired Table Sport

connection.offline: Offline - Please check your internet connection

modeSelector.adminDescription: Create tournaments, manage players/referees, set schedules

modeSelector.refereeAriaLabel: Enter Referee Mode - Score assigned matches, practice mode
modeSelector.spectatorAriaLabel: Enter Spectator Mode - Watch live matches, favorites, notifications

login.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
login.lockedMessage: Incorrect PIN. Locked for {{seconds}} seconds due to too many attempts.

pinSetup.description: If this is your first time, please set up an admin PIN.
pinSetup.minLengthError: PIN must be at least 4 digits.

home.title: Dashboard
home.startPrompt: Create a new tournament to get started.

deleteModal.title: Delete Tournament
deleteModal.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the {{name}} tournament? All related data will be permanently deleted.

settings.title: Admin Settings
settings.newPinMinLength: New PIN must be at least 4 digits.
settings.noAdmins: No admins registered. (Logged in with legacy PIN)
settings.cannotDeleteSelf: Cannot delete the currently logged-in admin account.
settings.confirmDeleteAdmin: Are you sure you want to delete admin {{name}}?

players.title: Player Management
players.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete player {{name}}?

referees.title: Referee Management
referees.pinLabelEdit: PIN (4 or more digits) - Enter only to change
referees.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete referee {{name}}?
referees.pinMinLength: PIN must be at least 4 digits.

courts.title: Court Management
courts.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete court {{name}}?

basicInfo.oneDayHint: Leave end date blank for a one-day tournament

presets.title: Configuration Method
presets.presetHint: Selecting a preset takes you directly to the confirmation screen. Custom setup lets you adjust detailed options.
presets.customDescription: Freely configure participant count, group setup, qualifying/finals rules, and more

tournamentMode.title: Tournament Format
tournamentMode.fullLeagueDescription: All participants play each other once. No group stage.
tournamentMode.groupTournamentDescription: Group round robin followed by finals tournament.
tournamentMode.manualDescription: Register participants only; set up brackets and schedule manually.

manualMode.title: Manual Tournament Setup
manualMode.allManualNote: All setup will be done manually
manualMode.allManualDescription: Configure groups, bracket assignments, courts, and schedules manually in tournament details.
manualMode.groupAssignmentNote: Group assignments will be done manually in tournament details
manualMode.bracketNote: Bracket assignments will be done manually in tournament details
manualMode.noStageNote: If no stage is selected, only participants are registered. All setup can be done in tournament details.

teamSettings.title: Team Settings
teamSettings.teamSizeHint: You can configure different sizes per team in tournament details

groupQualifying.title: Group Qualifying Settings
groupQualifying.snakeDraft: Distributed fairly using snake draft method
groupQualifying.perGroupTooFew: Too few {{unit}} per group. Reduce the number of groups or increase {{participantUnit}}.
groupQualifying.wildcardExplanation: The best {{count}}{{unit}} ranked {{rank}} from each group will advance

matchRules.title: Match Rules
matchRules.roundScoringOverride: Change set count in later rounds

finals.singleEliminationDescription: Lose and you're out. Fast-paced and intense.
finals.doubleEliminationDescription: Eliminated after two losses. One loss won't knock you out.
finals.roundRobinDescription: All participants (teams) play each other. The fairest format.
finals.byeInfo: {{advance}}{{unit}} advance / Round of {{round}} → {{bye}}{{unit}} receive a BYE
finals.crossGroupDescription: Group A 1st vs Group B 2nd, cross-placed
finals.sequentialDescription: Overall ranking: 1st vs last, 2nd vs second-to-last
finals.assignAllSlots: Please assign all slots. {{count}} slots remaining.
finals.allTeamsPlay: All teams play each other once.
finals.allPlayersPlay: All participants play each other once.

preview.title: Review Settings & Preview
preview.manualModeDescription: Group assignments and bracket pairings will be done manually in tournament details.
preview.manualNextStepDescription: After creating the tournament, in the [Tournament Details] page:
preview.scheduleDescription: After creating the tournament, you can assign courts, referees, and set times in [Tournament Details > Schedule] tab.
preview.scoringRulesSummary: {{winScore}} pts | Best of {{setsToWin}} | Max {{maxSets}} sets | {{minLead}} pt lead
preview.scoringRulesWithDeuce: {{winScore}} pts | Best of {{setsToWin}} | Max {{maxSets}} sets | {{minLead}} pt lead | Deuce
preview.setsPerRoundAriaLabel: Sets per round: default {{maxSets}} sets best of {{setsToWin}}, from {{fromRound}} {{overrideMaxSets}} sets best of {{overrideSetsToWin}}

simulation.title: Test Simulation
simulation.description: Automatically generate virtual participants, match results, and rankings.
simulation.existingTeamNote: If teams are already registered, they will be used for the simulation.
simulation.autoBracketDescription: Automatically create group round robin brackets.
simulation.autoRefereeDescription: Create virtual referees and assign them to matches.
simulation.autoCourtDescription: Create virtual courts and assign them to the schedule.
simulation.enterTeamCount: Please enter the number of teams.
simulation.enterPlayerCount: Please enter the number of participants.
simulation.completed: Simulation complete! {{count}} matches created, tournament status: {{status}}

finalsSetup.title: Finals Tournament Setup
finalsSetup.description: Set the number of participants advancing to the finals from each group.

topSeedSection.title: Top Seed Assignment
topSeedSection.descriptionManual: Assigning seeds creates groups equal to the number of seeds (Seed A → Group A, Seed B → Group B). Click a player to assign a seed.
topSeedSection.descriptionAuto: Seeded players are placed in their respective groups (Seed A → Group A, Seed B → Group B). Up to {{max}} seeds can be assigned.
topSeedSection.seedRemoveAriaLabel: {{name}} Seed {{label}} (placed in Group {{label}}, click to remove)
topSeedSection.currentGroupCount: Currently {{count}} groups configured. Group assignments can be made in the Bracket tab.

finalsSetupInline.finalsReady: Finals setup complete. Create qualifying brackets in the Bracket tab, then manually arrange finals after qualifying is complete.

bracketTab.title: Bracket
bracketTab.seedPlacement: Seed Placement (Seed A→Group A, B→Group B)
bracketTab.seedPlacementHint: Only seeded players are placed in groups. Assign remaining players below.
bracketTab.groupEditWarning: Groups have been manually changed. Regenerate the bracket to apply changes.
bracketTab.bulkRefereeDescription: Select to assign referees to all unassigned matches in order.
bracketTab.finalsProgress: Qualifying: {{completed}}/{{total}} matches complete | {{advancePerGroup}} per group advance ({{totalAdvance}} total) | {{matchCount}} finals matches
bracketTab.createFinalsSlotsHint: After creating slots, you can manually assign players by group/rank to each match.
bracketTab.manualArrangementHint: Select group and rank for each match to manually arrange the bracket.
bracketTab.arrangementSelectHint: Select group and rank for each match to arrange the bracket.
bracketTab.manualAddHint: Use the "Add Match" button above to register matches one by one.
bracketTab.deleteMatchConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this match?
bracketTab.cannotEditWhileActive: Cannot modify bracket while matches are in progress.

statusTab.qualifyingDone: Qualifying complete - finalists have been determined

statusTab.walkoverError: An error occurred while processing the walkover.

home.title: Tournaments
home.practiceWatchDescription: View ongoing or completed practice matches

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.addHint: Tap the ☆ button next to a player's name while watching a tournament to add them

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.unsupported: This browser does not support notifications.
notifications.enabledDetail: You'll be notified 10 minutes before your favorited player's match, when matches start, and when results are available.
notifications.pushEnabled: Background push notifications are enabled. You'll receive alerts even when the app is closed.
notifications.deniedDetail: Please allow notification permissions for this site in your browser settings. Click the lock icon to the left of the address bar > Notifications > Allow
notifications.promptMessage: Enable notifications to receive alerts 10 minutes before your favorited player's matches, match starts, and match results.
notifications.quietHoursDesc: Notifications are silenced during this time

sync.title: Sync Across Devices
sync.description: Sign in with Google to automatically sync favorites across all your devices.

practiceWatch.title: Practice Matches
practiceWatch.noLiveHint: Start a practice match in referee mode to see it here
